overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a futuristic urban park that transitions into a covered walkway. The environment shifts from sunlit tree-lined paths with scattered debris to neon-lit enclosed corridors featuring graffiti and street art.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban park path with tree canopy

events.description: player character comes into view and begins walking forward along the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved path through the sunlit park, passing benches and trees

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench beside the path

entered.detail: dense line of tall trees forming a canopy over the left side of the path
dense line of tall trees forming a canopy over the right side of the path
concrete park bench with seated individual
futuristic neon advertisement visible through the tree canopy
scattered trash bags and debris along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit urban park path lined with dense trees on both sides. The camera moves forward through dappled sunlight, passing concrete benches where pedestrians sit. Futuristic neon billboards are visible in the distance through the foliage, establishing the cyberpunk setting. At around 6 seconds, the player character comes into view and begins walking steadily along the path.

events.description: entering the shadow of the massive concrete overpass, transitioning from sunlight to artificial neon lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing forward into the covered area beneath the overpass, passing vertical neon light fixtures

entered.detail: massive angular concrete overpass structure spanning overhead
tall vertical cyan neon light strip
tall vertical cyan neon light strip

segments.scene_description: The character walks into a transitional zone beneath a massive concrete overpass. Natural sunlight fades as the path enters deep shadow, illuminated by vertical cyan neon light strips lining the walkway. The tree canopy becomes sparse as the enclosed urban structure dominates the scene, creating a stark contrast between the natural park and the built environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed urban corridor with graffiti walls

events.description: entering fully enclosed corridor with graffiti-covered walls and posters

agents.ego_description: navigating through the enclosed corridor, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear walking toward the camera
child walking along the right side of the path

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art including 'NO FUTURE' text
large vertical advertisement poster on the wall ahead
poster featuring a skull graphic and bright colors
wooden barrier with graffiti blocking off a side area

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a fully enclosed urban corridor beneath the overpass. The walls are covered in vibrant graffiti and street art, with large posters advertising various products. The lighting is entirely artificial, casting a moody glow on the scene. The character passes several pedestrians walking in the opposite direction, including a woman and a child, as the path leads deeper into the covered walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a sunlit urban park that gradually transitions into a moody, neon-lit enclosed corridor. It begins on a path lined with dense trees and dappled sunlight, passing concrete benches and distant neon billboards before the player character enters the frame. As the camera follows the character, the natural light fades while the path moves beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the tree canopy thins and vertical cyan neon strips begin to illuminate the deepening shadows. The scene then shifts into a fully enclosed urban walkway, replacing the greenery with walls covered in vibrant graffiti and commercial posters. Finally, the environment becomes entirely artificial in lighting as the character passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction, moving deeper into the covered urban structure.
